meaning: n.(藤本植物的)棚架,藤架,绿廊,凉棚
examples: There is obviously edge angle in the towel gourd, whose one end has a small yellow flower, which seems to whisper with small cucurbits under the pergola.
These beams form a pergola where the indirect lighting system is fixed.
They approached an olden building warmed by pastel roses climbing a wrought-iron pergola.
Outside, the home has a pool, several patios with views and a covered pergola with outdoor fireplace.
Novarro accepted the offer and rehired Wright to make the house his own, adding a pergola, music room and bedroom suite.
